mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, report_id, task_type, status, priority, parameters, progress, result, error_message, parent_task_id, shard_seq, shard_total, created_by, created_at, started_at, completed_at, cancelled_at FROM task WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task (tenant_id, report_id, task_type, status, priority, parameters, progress, parent_task_id, shard_seq, shard_total, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{reportId}, #{taskType}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{parameters}, #{progress}, #{parentTaskId}, #{shardSeq}, #{shardTotal}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, result = #{result}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, started_at = #{startedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, cancelled_at = #{cancelledAt} WHERE id = #{id}
